title: Successful Google and memdrive extraction rows are omitted from live canonical search

createdViaParent.expansionReason: Active runtime exposes no runSubagent/agent tool; bugfix-fastlane is not a top-level-runtime-required mode, so bubbles.workflow (dispatched by bubbles.iterate) executes each phase owner's contract inline. implement is the committed 8c4a10bf fix (test-fixture query isolation: tests/e2e/drive/drive_cross_feature_e2e_test.go +35/-10 — a collision-resistant per-run searchTerm applied to both provider fixtures and the /api/search query, plus a retained twenty-Tomato-salad-contender adversary), an ancestor of HEAD. test/regression were RE-VERIFIED live this session: the revert-reverify (RED — reverting only line 38 to searchTerm := "Tomato salad" collides with the twenty contenders and reproduces google=false mem=false, RED_E2E_EXIT=1; GREEN — byte-exact git checkout HEAD restore, --- PASS, GREEN_E2E_EXIT=0) plus the full Drive E2E package (./smackerel.sh test e2e --go-run '^TestDrive' -> 18/18 PASS, BROAD_E2E_EXIT=0) and both cross-feature integration tests (INTEG_EXIT=0, INTEG3_EXIT=0). simplify/stabilize are bounded direct reviews (test-only change, no sleeps, uniquely-identified connections with t.Cleanup). security/validate/audit carry prior operator-attested specialist provenance plus this session's guard-backed reconciliation (state-transition-guard PASS failedGateIds [], artifact-lint exit 0, RQG std+bugfix 0 violations w/ adversarial signal, reality-scan 0 violations).

executionHistory.summary: The load-bearing fix is committed in 8c4a10bf (git merge-base --is-ancestor 8c4a10bf HEAD = YES-ANCESTOR on main). It is a test-fixture query-isolation change in tests/e2e/drive/drive_cross_feature_e2e_test.go (+35/-10): a collision-resistant per-run searchTerm := "drivecrossprovider" + uuid is applied to both provider fixture titles/content and the authenticated /api/search query, and twenty exact-title 'Tomato salad' contenders (generate_series(1,20)) are retained as an adversary so removing the isolation fails the regression. Exact artifact-ID, drive.provider_id, folder/sharing/audience/sensitivity assertions and t.Cleanup isolation are unchanged. Test-only change at the confirmed owning layer (design.md Root Cause); no production search/runtime, policy, package-serialization, synthesis/assistant, deploy, knb, or release-train surface touched.

Current-session genuine revert-reverify (good-neighbor; block-wait on the shared lock, no foreign stack evicted, own stack torn down clean). RED — reverting ONLY line 38 to searchTerm := "Tomato salad" (colliding with the twenty retained contenders) reproduces drive_cross_feature_e2e_test.go:172 /api/search must return BOTH provider rows; google=false mem=false, --- FAIL (2.11s), RED_E2E_EXIT=1, while both providers scan seen=1 indexed=1. GREEN — git checkout HEAD -- restores the collision-resistant term byte-exact and the same test returns --- PASS (2.13s), GREEN_E2E_EXIT=0. Focused search units PASS (SEARCH_UNIT_EXIT=0); full Go+Python unit suites PASS ([go-unit] OK, [py-unit] 708 passed, FULL_UNIT_EXIT=0); both cross-feature integration tests PASS (TestMultiProviderDriveSearchUsesUnifiedRankingAndAudienceFilters INTEG_EXIT=0, TestDriveArtifactsFeedRecipesExpensesListsAnnotationsMealPlanDigest INTEG3_EXIT=0). Evidence in report.md 'Current-Session Revert-Reverify' + 'Current-Session Broader Verification'.

Broader Drive E2E regression: ./smackerel.sh test e2e --go-run '^TestDrive' -> 18/18 TestDrive* scenarios PASS, ok tests/e2e/drive 5.303s, PASS: go-e2e, BROAD_E2E_EXIT=0. Includes the bug's regression (TestDriveCrossFeatureE2E_ProviderNeutralConsumersAndProducers), cascade-noise recovery (TestDriveObservabilityE2E_MetricsAndCountersReconcileAfterStressFixture — metrics/counters reconcile after the stress fixture on the same disposable stack), and provider/audience/sensitivity strictness (TestDrivePolicyE2E_*, TestDriveRetrieveE2E_*). No product regression; no findings to route. The ambient 'Skipping Ollama agent E2E' harness line is dispositioned DI-038-002-01 (G095).

n/a with provenance. Bounded review: the fix is the smallest viable change — one collision-resistant per-run term plus a retained adversarial corpus, reusing the existing scan/extract/consumers/search foundation (spec.md '### Single-Capability Justification'). No new type, abstraction, provider registry, indirection, sleep, or fallback introduced; a new search-provider registry was explicitly rejected in design.md. check/lint/format clean (CHECK_EXIT=0, LINT_EXIT=0, FORMAT_EXIT=0). Nothing to simplify.

n/a with provenance. Bounded stability review: test-only change; zero production-image / Compose / container-lifecycle / schema / NATS / migration changes. The regression uses uniquely-identified google+memdrive connections and t.Cleanup deletes only its own drive_connections/artifacts rows (no cross-package coupling). The disposable stack is torn down cleanly on exit in every live leg (good-neighbor). Quality guards: RQG_STD_EXIT=0 (0 violations), RQG_BUGFIX_EXIT=0 (adversarial signal detected), REALITY_EXIT=0 (0 violations).
